primary_emotion: Regal exclusivity — you are someone who deserves rare, handcrafted luxury
secondary_emotions: Intimate warmth — handmade by the person answering your email
Earned sophistication — not inherited wealth, but self-crowned authority
Scarcity desire — when it's gone, it's gone
aspirational_target: After visiting, you feel like you discovered something rare that most people will never know about — and you want it before it sells out
anti_feelings: Generic skincare brand (Bath & Body Works energy)
Cheap or amateur (must feel premium despite being a startup)
Cold or clinical (must feel warm, intimate, human)
reference_vibe: Walking into a private atelier in Paris where the owner knows your name, the lights are low, the products are unlabeled, and everything smells incredible

brand_personality_matrix.minimal_vs_maximal: 3/10 — highly minimal, negative space is the luxury signal
brand_personality_matrix.classic_vs_avant_garde: 6/10 — classic luxury base with modern editorial flair
brand_personality_matrix.quiet_vs_bold: 6/10 — quiet confidence with bold gold moments
brand_personality_matrix.summary: Crown Collection is a warm, intimate luxury brand that uses restraint as its power move. Dark spaces, warm gold, editorial typography — it whispers rather than shouts, but when it speaks, you listen.
